chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الرِّضَا بِمَوْهِبَةِ الْإِيمَانِ وَ الصَّبْرِ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْ‏ءٍ بَعْدَهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 101 – The satisfaction with the gift of the Emān and the patience upon everything after it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/293)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/293)
text: سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ مَا يَنْبَغِي لِلْمُؤْمِنِ أَنْ يَسْتَوْحِشَ إِلَى أَخِيهِ فَمَنْ دُونَهُ الْمُؤْمِنُ عَزِيزٌ فِي دِينِهِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Yunus, from Kuleyb Bin Muawiya,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws, said, ‘I heard himasws saying: ‘It is not befitting for the Momin that he alienates to his brother from the ones below him (in understanding). The Momineen are highly valued people in their Religion’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Yunus from Kulayb ibn Mu’awiyah who has said the following: “I heard abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) saying, ‘It does not benefit a believer to be apprehensive of his brother (in belief) of less perfect belief; believers are highly valued people in their religion.’”
